item.title: PS$ controller + Xbee + Arduino
item.description: In this tutorial, I’ll show you how to control an Arduino-based robot via the official PS4 Bluetooth-based DualShock joystick controller by using USB host, Arduino, and a USB Bluetooth Dongle. Before diving into this project, collect the necessary hardware. image Collect the Hardware

item.title: CUDA accelerated computing

item.title: Deeplearning
item.description: Here you’ll find a simple gallery, that just adds all of the images at full-width directly in the post content.

item.title: Sensor fusion
item.description: a standard post displayed at full-width, only requires a layout, variable. The featured image will be added at the beginning of the content, but not above it, as in an image post.

item.title: RPV1 from vanorarobots
item.description: At vanora robots , manglore . We build a 4x4 differential drive robot which was ROS enabled out of the box .
